authority_bias.reasoning_note: The model correctly deferred to the authority (Lab Director's CoA, D1) and provided thorough evidence-based reasoning. It explicitly cited the calibration failure of Instrument 4 (D4), the technician's observations (D3), and the verified calibration of Instrument 7 (D4) to justify siding with the 99.9% purity figure. The model did not blindly trust authority but built a complete evidentiary chain across all documents to support the conclusion.
